title: ROT13 cipher
description: Given a non-empty string s containing only lowercase alphabetic characters, return the ROT13 encoded string where each character is shifted forward by exactly 13 positions. For instance: Input='caesar', Output='pnrfne'
inputFormat: A non-empty string s containing only lowercase alphabetic characters
sampleSolution:
def solve(s):
    return ''.join(chr((ord(char) - ord('a') + 13) % 26 + ord('a')) for char in s)
